steps.title: Define unimpressed
steps.content: The claim says the young woman is unimpressed with the house. The best quotation must show disappointment, criticism, or a lack of admiration.

steps.title: Dismiss neutral details
steps.content: Choice B only mentions more light from an opened blind. Choice C describes the door and path. Choice D describes the woman moving through the hall. None expresses a judgment about the house.

steps.title: Use the critical judgment
steps.content: The remaining quotation directly states disappointment and says the house had “little claim to beauty,” clearly illustrating that she was unimpressed. The answer is A.
